name: generate_day
description: Kick off a fresh fire-risk forecast for Greater London on the DGX Spark (a GPT-2 rollout across all stations). Use when the operator asks to generate, regenerate, run, or forecast a day, or to model specific conditions. All parameters are optional: omit them to use the panel's current values (which default to live weather and today). Provide only what the operator specifies. This is long-running (about a minute) and fire-and-forget — confirm it has started; the map refreshes automatically when it completes.

date.description: Day to forecast as YYYY-MM-DD. Omit for today. Compute the ISO date yourself if the operator says 'tomorrow' etc.

hour.description: Start hour of the rollout, integer 0-23. Omit to keep the panel's current start hour.

temp.description: Air temperature in degrees Celsius. Omit to keep current/live value.

wind.description: Wind speed in km/h. Omit to keep current/live value.

rain.description: Rainfall in mm/h. Omit to keep current/live value.

resolution.description: Rollout detail: 'fast' (10/station), 'balanced' (15), or 'full' (20). Omit to keep the current setting.
